title: Korak 14

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should assign an instance of MediaCatalogue to a variable named catalogue before your try block.
You should print catalogue at the end of your try block.

description:
Pre bloka try, kreirajte instancu od MediaCatalogue i dodelite je promenljivoj pod imenom catalogue.

Zatim, koristite metodu add za dodavanje movie1 u katalog. Na kraju ispišite catalogue na konzolu.
